name: MOOZ
short_description: This is an adventure novel of suspense and horror in which the story diverges depending on the choices you make. An online drinking session with friends. A person with a knife is lurking in the background. What will you do to rescue your friend?
detailed_description:
A suspense horror adventure novel where the story branches based on your choices.

Story

You are having an online drinking party with your friends. It was supposed to be an ordinary day.

However, you witness a creepy woman holding a knife appear in your friend’s room through the screen.

Your friend, who has returned to the room, seems unaware of the impending danger.

How will you warn your friend and save them from the threat?

Objective

Choose actions and conversations to aim for an ending where your friend is rescued.

As you progress through the game, new mysteries will emerge that you will want to solve.

The goal of the game is to solve the problems and read all the stories to complete all the endings.

How to Play

Click the mouse to advance the text.

Click the mouse to select options.

After reaching one ending, start the game from the beginning or from a certain point to choose different options.

You can skip the text of previously read parts by pressing the skip button.
